title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud presented updates to its NoSQL database services Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable, highlighting their capabilities for AI and modern applications. The session covered product releases, architectural innovations, and roadmaps tailored for agentic and AI workloads at scale.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session covers updates across three NoSQL services: Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable, framed around AI and modern application needs. It walks through product releases, architectural innovations, and roadmaps tailored for agentic and AI workloads at scale. The relevance lies in how these databases position themselves for AI agents alongside relational systems. The takeaway is a consolidated view of where each service is headed for high-scale AI use.
